text.autoconfig.wynnvp.option.autoProgre: After an NPC finishes their line, it will automatically forward to the next line
text.autoconfig.wynnvp.option.blockCutOf: The minimum distance in blocks that the sound will be cut off from the speaker. For some sounds a manual adjustment is set to prevent the sound not being heard
text.autoconfig.wynnvp.option.blockVilla: Mutes villager and related sounds while voice dialog is active, preventing them from playing over voice lines.
text.autoconfig.wynnvp.option.debugAndLo: Custom path to audio files. This can be a url starting with (http...) or a local folder path.
Path to a custom sounds.json file containing dialogue-to-audio mappings. This will override the default sounds.json.
Should there be an aura of particles highlighting the source of the sound? This is mostly useful for debugging
If each time a dialogue that is encountered should be put into the vowlog.txt file
Print overlay-based dialogue lines (e.g. from Fruma) into the chat as they are detected. Useful for debugging the overlay dialogue system.
Log every overlay packet's extracted npc and body text to vowLog.txt. Use this to capture real packet sequences from in-game and replay them as unit tests.
Log a bunch of miscellaneous things about playing sounds
A setting for logDialogueLines to only log missing lines
If the custom audio path should be used that is defined in the next option
Enable loading dialogue mappings from a custom sounds.json file instead of the default one
text.autoconfig.wynnvp.option.downloadSo: If all sounds should be downloaded. Enable this if you experience high latency in audio playback
text.autoconfig.wynnvp.option.earlyPlayO: Start playing dialogue as soon as a partial line matches, before the typewriter animation finishes. Disable to only play after the full line is received. Note: when voice acting is missing for a line, an early partial match may cause the wrong audio to play.
Minimum number of characters a partial line must match before early audio playback is triggered. Lines shorter than this threshold will play once the full line is received instead.
text.autoconfig.wynnvp.option.enableReve: Adds environmental reverb effects to NPC voices based on their location (caves, buildings, etc.)
text.autoconfig.wynnvp.option.nicknameOv: If you use a Wynncraft Nickname, enter it here. It will be replaced alongside your real username when matching dialogue lines to audio.
text.autoconfig.wynnvp.option.playAllSou: This will disable the stereo effect of voices.
text.autoconfig.wynnvp.option.playbackSp: Controls the speed of voice playback. 100% is normal speed, lower values slow down speech, higher values speed it up. Might introduce audio artifacts.
text.autoconfig.wynnvp.option.voiceVolum: Adjusts the volume of voices played by this mod. 100% matches Minecraft's Voice/Speech volume.
text.autoconfig.wynnvp.title: Voices of wynning config
text.toast.downloadProgress.title: Downloading Voices of Wynn Audio
